question: Ten people are given a choice of two treatments. Let $p$ represent the proportion of patients in the patient population who prefer treatment A . Among the 10 patients asked, 7 preferred method A. Assuming there is no preference in the patient population (i.e., $p= 0.5)$, calculate $\operatorname{Pr}(X \geq 7)$.

meta info.caption: Patient preference.
meta info.section: 8.3 SAMPLING BEHAVIOR OF A COUNT AND PROPORTION
